items.name_en: Bright Red·
items.name_cn:
Bright Red·
SOLFERINO BOX_23cm
A best-seller that took over the entire fashion world before it even launched. Inspired by the Paris street Rue De Solferino, this bag features original patent Box calfskin with excellent texture and flexibility. The interior features a three-panel accordion pocket for daily essentials. The newly designed 'L' letter clasp opens vertically, completely redefining your perception of bag closures. It's simply too fun!
Model: 634305
Size: 23x16x6cm

Brown
Iconic Peekaboo ISeeU small handbag, full-grain leather, small size hand-stitched, classic turn-lock on both sides. Suede lining in matching color, two compartments separated by hard dividers, interior pocket with button and vintage gold metal hardware. Handbag comes with handle and adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody. Dimensions 27*9.5*21cm
Style 327
